content.text:
## Section 6 : Intégrations

### Stripe — Billing SaaS

**Plans marchands :**

| Plan | Prix | Limites |
|---|---|---|
| Free | 0€ | 1 programme, 50 clients, pas de campagnes AI |
| Pro | 29€/mois | 3 programmes, 500 clients, mode assisté |
| Business | 79€/mois | Programmes illimités, clients illimités, mode autonome |

**Flux :** Checkout Session → webhook `customer.subscription.created/updated/deleted` → maj colonne `plan` dans `merchants`. Portail Stripe pour self-service.

---

### n8n — AI Campagnes automatisées

**3 modes :**
- **Manuel** : le marchand crée et envoie ses campagnes
- **Assisté** : n8n suggère des campagnes, le marchand valide avant envoi
- **Autonome** : n8n crée et envoie automatiquement (dans la limite max_push_per_week)

**Webhook actions :** `send_campaign`, `send_notification`, `get_inactive_customers`, `get_campaign_stats`

**Auth :** Header `X-N8N-Secret` vérifié côté API route.

---

### Web Push — Notifications

- VAPID keys stockées en env vars
- Inscription push côté customer-web (`navigator.serviceWorker` + `PushManager`)
- `push_token` sauvegardé dans table `customers`
- Edge Function `send-push` envoie via Web Push API
- Tracking : `send-push` log dans `notifications`, tracking opens via `api/campaigns/track`

---

### PostGIS — Géolocalisation

- Extension PostGIS activée dans la migration
- `merchant_locations` avec colonne `geog` (geography)
- RPC `find_nearby_merchants(lat, lng, radius_m)` pour proximity
- Edge Function `proximity-check` appelée depuis customer-web (Geolocation API du navigateur)

---

### i18n — Internationalisation

- `next-intl` dans les deux apps
- 4 langues : **fr**, **en**, **es**, **ar**
- Fichiers de traduction dans `messages/{locale}.json` par app
- Détection auto de la langue navigateur + override dans settings client

---

### NFC

- Lecture tags NFC via Web NFC API (Chrome Android uniquement)
- Fallback QR si NFC non supporté
- Payload NFC = même `secret_key` que le QR code marchand

---

### Referrals — Parrainage

- Chaque client reçoit un `referral_code` unique
- Partage par lien : `customer-web/register?ref=CODE`
- À l'inscription du filleul → `process-referral` Edge Function
- Récompense : bonus stamps/points pour parrain et filleul
- Statuts : `pending` → `completed` | `expired`

---

**Changement vs loyalty-app :** Même périmètre exact. La différence est que chaque intégration sera **complètement implémentée** dès le départ — plus de stubs ou de pages scaffoldées vides.

Dernière section : la stratégie de déploiement et les conventions de code. On continue ?

content.text:
## Section 7 : Déploiement & Conventions

### Déploiement

**Apps Next.js → Vercel**
- 2 projets Vercel séparés : `royal-dashboard` et `royal-customer`
- Monorepo détecté automatiquement par Vercel (root directory filter)
- Variables d'environnement par projet
- Preview deployments sur chaque PR

**Supabase → Supabase Cloud**
- Migrations via `supabase db push`
- Edge Functions via `supabase functions deploy`
- Un seul projet Supabase pour les deux apps

**CI/CD → GitHub Actions**
- `ci.yml` : lint + typecheck + build sur chaque PR
- `deploy-functions.yml` : deploy Edge Functions sur push main
- Pas de deploy auto des apps (Vercel gère)

---

### Conventions de code

**Nommage :**
- Fichiers : `kebab-case` (ex: `loyalty-card.tsx`, `plan-limits.ts`)
- Composants : `PascalCase` (ex: `LoyaltyCard`, `KpiCards`)
- Fonctions/hooks : `camelCase` (ex: `useSupabase`, `getProgramLimit`)
- Types : `PascalCase` (ex: `MerchantPlan`, `CustomerTier`)
- Constantes : `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (ex: `PLAN_LIMITS`, `VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY`)
- Tables DB : `snake_case` pluriel (ex: `loyalty_programs`, `customer_cards`)

**Packages npm internes :**
- `@royal/ui` — design system
- `@royal/shared` — types TypeScript
- `@royal/supabase` — client + helpers

**Structure composants :**
```
components/
├── ui/              # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)
├── forms/           # Formulaires métier (ProgramForm, CampaignForm)
├── layout/          # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/          # Composants métier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

**Qualité :**
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de `any` — `unknown` si nécessaire

---

### Résumé du design complet

| Aspect | Choix |
|---|---|
| Monorepo | pnpm + Turborepo |
| Framework | Next.js 15 (stable) |
| Design | citedby-io (glassmorphism, Geist Sans, émeraude, light/dark) |
| Backend | Supabase (PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage) |
| Billing | Stripe (Free/Pro/Business) |
| Automation | n8n (manual/assisted/autonomous) |
| Push | Web Push VAPID |
| i18n | next-intl (fr/en/es/ar) |
| DB | 1 migration propre (consolide les 14 de loyalty-app) |
| Deploy | Vercel (apps) + Supabase Cloud (backend) + GitHub Actions (CI) |
| Packages | @royal/ui, @royal/shared, @royal/supabase |

---

**C'est le design complet de RoyalApp.** Tout le périmètre fonctionnel de loyalty-app, réécriture propre, design citedby-io.

Vous validez ce design ? Si oui, je rédige le document et on passe au plan d'implémentation.

# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Réécriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidélité digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

---

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidélité digitale composée de :
- **Dashboard marchand** : gestion programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes de fidélité, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Le design visuel reprend le langage de citedby-io : glassmorphism, Geist Sans, accent émeraude, light/dark mode.

---

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

```
RoyalApp/
├── apps/
│   ├── dashboard/            # Next.js 15 — merchant dashboard (port 3000)
│   └── customer-web/         # Next.js 15 — customer PWA (port 3001)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                   # Design system (@royal/ui)
│   ├── shared/               # Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
│   └── supabase/             # Client Supabase + helpers (@royal/supabase)
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/
│   │   └── 001_initial_schema.sql
│   ├── functions/
│   │   ├── _shared/          # cors, errors, validate, supabase client
│   │   ├── validate-scan/
│   │   ├── redeem-reward/
│   │   ├── redeem-by-merchant/
│   │   ├── send-push/
│   │   ├── auto-notifications/
│   │   ├── update-tiers/
│   │   ├── proximity-check/
│   │   ├── process-referral/
│   │   └── api-v1/
│   └── config.toml
├── docs/plans/
├── .github/workflows/
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── turbo.json
├── .nvmrc
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 3. Design System (`@royal/ui`)

### Tokens CSS

**Light mode :**
| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #FAFAF8 |
| --bg-surface | #FFFFFF |
| --bg-elevated | #F5F5F3 |
| --bg-sidebar | #FFFFFF |
| --border-default | #E5E7EB |
| --border-subtle | #F0F0EE |
| --border-strong | #D1D5DB |
| --text-primary | #1A1A1A |
| --text-secondary | #6B7280 |
| --text-tertiary | #9CA3AF |
| --accent | #059669 |
| --accent-hover | #047857 |
| --accent-subtle | rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.08) |
| --glass-surface | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) |
| --glass-border | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) |

**Dark mode :**
| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #09090B |
| --bg-surface | #18181B |
| --bg-elevated | #27272A |
| --bg-sidebar | #0F0F11 |
| --border-default | #27272A |
| --border-strong | #3F3F46 |
| --text-primary | #FAFAFA |
| --text-secondary | #A1A1AA |
| --accent | #10B981 |
| --accent-text | #34D399 |
| --glass-surface | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) |
| --glass-border | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) |

### Typographie
- Principal : Geist Sans
- Mono : Geist Mono
- Scale : text-xs → text-5xl, font-medium/semibold/bold

### Layout
- **Dashboard** : AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
- **Customer-web** : Mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)

### Composants
- `ninja-card` : glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, hover-lift
- `StatsCard` : grille KPI 4 colonnes responsive
- `Badge` : semantic (success/warning/error) + tiers (bronze/silver/gold/vip)
- `Button` : primary (blanc/noir), secondary (glass), danger
- `Input` : bg-base, focus ring accent
- `Modal` : backdrop blur, rounded-2xl

### Animations
- fadeInUp, shimmer, pulseDot
- hover-lift (translateY -2px + shadow)
- press-effect (scale 0.98)
- stagger delays (50ms increments)

---

## 4. Base de données — Migration unique

### Tables

| Table | Rôle |
|---|---|
| merchants | Comptes marchands (plan, stripe_id, ai_mode, lat/lng) |
| merchant_locations | Multi-sites avec PostGIS |
| loyalty_programs | Programmes stamp/points (welcome bonus, expiration) |
| rewards | Récompenses par programme |
| tier_rules | Règles upgrade Bronze→Silver→Gold→VIP |
| customers | Profils clients (email, push_token, language) |
| customer_cards | Cartes fidélité (stamps, points, tier) |
| customer_qr_codes | QR personnels clients |
| transactions | Historique (type, value, validated_by) |
| qr_codes | QR marchands comptoir |
| campaigns | Campagnes marketing (A/B via parent_campaign_id) |
| notifications | Journal notifications |
| referrals | Système parrainage |
| api_keys | Clés API POS (SHA-256) |

### Inclus
- RLS policies sur toutes les tables
- Vue `merchant_kpis`
- PostGIS + triggers géographiques
- RPCs : `find_nearby_merchants`, `create_customer_with_qr`, `validate_customer_qr`, `track_campaign_event`
- Storage bucket `logos`

---

## 5. Edge Functions

| Fonction | Rôle |
|---|---|
| validate-scan | Client scanne QR marchand → crée/maj carte + stamps/points + welcome bonus |
| redeem-reward | Client rédime reward |
| redeem-by-merchant | Marchand scanne QR client → valide + rédime |
| send-push | Envoi campagne push avec split A/B |
| auto-notifications | Cron : rappels inactivité, expirations, upgrades |
| update-tiers | Cron : évalue tier_rules 90j → upgrade/downgrade |
| proximity-check | Position client → notifications marchands proches |
| process-referral | Traitement parrainage |
| api-v1 | API REST publique POS (auth API key) |

Couche partagée `_shared/` : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client.

---

## 6. Dashboard marchand — Pages

| Route | Rôle |
|---|---|
| (dashboard)/ | Home KPI, programmes actifs, activité récente |
| (dashboard)/programs/ | Liste programmes + plan limits |
| (dashboard)/programs/new | Création programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id] | Détail + édition programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id]/rewards | Gestion rewards |
| (dashboard)/clients/ | Table clients (tier, activité) |
| (dashboard)/campaigns/ | Création + liste campagnes A/B |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ | Dashboard graphiques (recharts) |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ab-results | Résultats A/B |
| (dashboard)/scanner/ | Scanner QR client |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/ | Générateur QR marchand |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/nfc | Config tags NFC |
| (dashboard)/subscription/ | Abonnement Stripe |
| (dashboard)/settings/ | Paramètres (AI mode, push limits) |
| (dashboard)/settings/api | Clés API POS |
| (dashboard)/settings/locations | Multi-sites |

### API Routes

| Route | Rôle |
|---|---|
| api/stripe/checkout | Session Stripe Checkout |
| api/stripe/portal | Portail client Stripe |
| api/stripe/webhook | Webhook Stripe → maj plan |
| api/n8n/webhook | Webhook n8n (campaigns, notifications, stats) |
| api/pos/validate | POS → ajouter stamps/points |
| api/pos/redeem | POS → rédimer reward |
| api/campaigns/track | Tracking opens/clicks/conversions |

---

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

| Route | Rôle |
|---|---|
| / | Landing (redirect si connecté) |
| /login | Auth email/password |
| /register | Inscription (support ?ref=CODE) |
| /dashboard | Cartes fidélité + QR personnel |
| /scan | Scanner QR marchand |
| /dashboard/settings | Profil, langue, notifications |

Layout mobile-first : header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil).

---

## 8. Intégrations

### Stripe
- Plans : Free (0€) / Pro (29€/mois) / Business (79€/mois)
- Checkout Session → webhook → maj plan marchand
- Portail self-service

### n8n
- Modes : manual / assisted / autonomous
- Actions webhook : send_campaign, send_notification, get_inactive_customers, get_campaign_stats
- Auth : header X-N8N-Secret

### Web Push
- VAPID keys en env vars
- Inscription via PushManager côté customer-web
- push_token sauvé dans customers
- Envoi via send-push Edge Function

### PostGIS
- Extension activée dans migration
- merchant_locations avec geog
- RPC find_nearby_merchants
- proximity-check Edge Function

### i18n
- next-intl dans les deux apps
- Langues : fr, en, es, ar
- Détection auto navigateur + override settings

### NFC
- Web NFC API (Chrome Android)
- Fallback QR si non supporté
- Payload = secret_key QR marchand

### Referrals
- referral_code unique par client
- Lien : customer-web/register?ref=CODE
- process-referral Edge Function
- Bonus parrain + filleul

---

## 9. Déploiement

- Types : PascalCase

components/
├── ui/        # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)

├── layout/    # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/    # Composants métier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

### Qualité

- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de `any` — `unknown` si nécessaire

input.content:
# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Reecriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

---

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale composee de :
- **Dashboard marchand** : gestion programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes de fidelite, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Le design visuel reprend le langage de citedby-io : glassmorphism, Geist Sans, accent emeraude, light/dark mode.

---

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

```
RoyalApp/
├── apps/
│   ├── dashboard/            # Next.js 15 — merchant dashboard (port 3000)
│   └── customer-web/         # Next.js 15 — customer PWA (port 3001)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                   # Design system (@royal/ui)
│   ├── shared/               # Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
│   └── supabase/             # Client Supabase + helpers (@royal/supabase)
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/
│   │   └── 001_initial_schema.sql
│   ├── functions/
│   │   ├── _shared/          # cors, errors, validate, supabase client
│   │   ├── validate-scan/
│   │   ├── redeem-reward/
│   │   ├── redeem-by-merchant/
│   │   ├── send-push/
│   │   ├── auto-notifications/
│   │   ├── update-tiers/
│   │   ├── proximity-check/
│   │   ├── process-referral/
│   │   └── api-v1/
│   └── config.toml
├── docs/plans/
├── .github/workflows/
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── turbo.json
├── .nvmrc
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 3. Design System (@royal/ui)

### Tokens CSS

**Light mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #FAFAF8 |
| --bg-surface | #FFFFFF |
| --bg-elevated | #F5F5F3 |
| --bg-sidebar | #FFFFFF |
| --border-default | #E5E7EB |
| --border-subtle | #F0F0EE |
| --border-strong | #D1D5DB |
| --text-primary | #1A1A1A |
| --text-secondary | #6B7280 |
| --text-tertiary | #9CA3AF |
| --accent | #059669 |
| --accent-hover | #047857 |
| --accent-subtle | rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.08) |
| --glass-surface | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) |
| --glass-border | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) |

**Dark mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #09090B |
| --bg-surface | #18181B |
| --bg-elevated | #27272A |
| --bg-sidebar | #0F0F11 |
| --border-default | #27272A |
| --border-strong | #3F3F46 |
| --text-primary | #FAFAFA |
| --text-secondary | #A1A1AA |
| --accent | #10B981 |
| --accent-text | #34D399 |
| --glass-surface | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) |
| --glass-border | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) |

### Typographie
- Principal : Geist Sans
- Mono : Geist Mono
- Scale : text-xs a text-5xl, font-medium/semibold/bold

### Layout
- **Dashboard** : AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
- **Customer-web** : Mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)

### Composants
- `ninja-card` : glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, hover-lift
- `StatsCard` : grille KPI 4 colonnes responsive
- `Badge` : semantic (success/warning/error) + tiers (bronze/silver/gold/vip)
- `Button` : primary (blanc/noir), secondary (glass), danger
- `Input` : bg-base, focus ring accent
- `Modal` : backdrop blur, rounded-2xl

### Animations
- fadeInUp, shimmer, pulseDot
- hover-lift (translateY -2px + shadow)
- press-effect (scale 0.98)
- stagger delays (50ms increments)

---

## 4. Base de donnees — Migration unique

### Tables

| Table | Role |
|---|---|
| merchants | Comptes marchands (plan, stripe_id, ai_mode, lat/lng) |
| merchant_locations | Multi-sites avec PostGIS |
| loyalty_programs | Programmes stamp/points (welcome bonus, expiration) |
| rewards | Recompenses par programme |
| tier_rules | Regles upgrade Bronze-Silver-Gold-VIP |
| customers | Profils clients (email, push_token, language) |
| customer_cards | Cartes fidelite (stamps, points, tier) |
| customer_qr_codes | QR personnels clients |
| transactions | Historique (type, value, validated_by) |
| qr_codes | QR marchands comptoir |
| campaigns | Campagnes marketing (A/B via parent_campaign_id) |
| notifications | Journal notifications |
| referrals | Systeme parrainage |
| api_keys | Cles API POS (SHA-256) |

### Inclus
- RLS policies sur toutes les tables
- Vue merchant_kpis
- PostGIS + triggers geographiques
- RPCs : find_nearby_merchants, create_customer_with_qr, validate_customer_qr, track_campaign_event
- Storage bucket logos

---

## 5. Edge Functions

| Fonction | Role |
|---|---|
| validate-scan | Client scanne QR marchand, cree/maj carte + stamps/points + welcome bonus |
| redeem-reward | Client redime reward |
| redeem-by-merchant | Marchand scanne QR client, valide + redime |
| send-push | Envoi campagne push avec split A/B |
| auto-notifications | Cron : rappels inactivite, expirations, upgrades |
| update-tiers | Cron : evalue tier_rules 90j, upgrade/downgrade |
| proximity-check | Position client, notifications marchands proches |
| process-referral | Traitement parrainage |
| api-v1 | API REST publique POS (auth API key) |

Couche partagee `_shared/` : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client.

---

## 6. Dashboard marchand — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| (dashboard)/ | Home KPI, programmes actifs, activite recente |
| (dashboard)/programs/ | Liste programmes + plan limits |
| (dashboard)/programs/new | Creation programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id] | Detail + edition programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id]/rewards | Gestion rewards |
| (dashboard)/clients/ | Table clients (tier, activite) |
| (dashboard)/campaigns/ | Creation + liste campagnes A/B |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ | Dashboard graphiques (recharts) |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ab-results | Resultats A/B |
| (dashboard)/scanner/ | Scanner QR client |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/ | Generateur QR marchand |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/nfc | Config tags NFC |
| (dashboard)/subscription/ | Abonnement Stripe |
| (dashboard)/settings/ | Parametres (AI mode, push limits) |
| (dashboard)/settings/api | Cles API POS |
| (dashboard)/settings/locations | Multi-sites |

### API Routes

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| api/stripe/checkout | Session Stripe Checkout |
| api/stripe/portal | Portail client Stripe |
| api/stripe/webhook | Webhook Stripe, maj plan |
| api/n8n/webhook | Webhook n8n (campaigns, notifications, stats) |
| api/pos/validate | POS, ajouter stamps/points |
| api/pos/redeem | POS, redimer reward |
| api/campaigns/track | Tracking opens/clicks/conversions |

---

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| / | Landing (redirect si connecte) |
| /login | Auth email/password |
| /register | Inscription (support ?ref=CODE) |
| /dashboard | Cartes fidelite + QR personnel |
| /scan | Scanner QR marchand |
| /dashboard/settings | Profil, langue, notifications |

Layout mobile-first : header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil).

---

## 8. Integrations

### Stripe
- Plans : Free (0 EUR) / Pro (29 EUR/mois) / Business (79 EUR/mois)
- Checkout Session, webhook, maj plan marchand
- Portail self-service

### n8n
- Modes : manual / assisted / autonomous
- Actions webhook : send_campaign, send_notification, get_inactive_customers, get_campaign_stats
- Auth : header X-N8N-Secret

### Web Push
- VAPID keys en env vars
- Inscription via PushManager cote customer-web
- push_token sauve dans customers
- Envoi via send-push Edge Function

### PostGIS
- Extension activee dans migration
- merchant_locations avec geog
- RPC find_nearby_merchants
- proximity-check Edge Function

### i18n
- next-intl dans les deux apps
- Langues : fr, en, es, ar
- Detection auto navigateur + override settings

### NFC
- Web NFC API (Chrome Android)
- Fallback QR si non supporte
- Payload = secret_key QR marchand

### Referrals
- referral_code unique par client
- Lien : customer-web/register?ref=CODE
- process-referral Edge Function
- Bonus parrain + filleul

---

## 9. Deploiement

| Composant | Cible |
|---|---|
| apps/dashboard | Vercel (royal-dashboard) |
| apps/customer-web | Vercel (royal-customer) |
| Supabase | Supabase Cloud |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |

### GitHub Actions
- ci.yml : lint + typecheck + build sur chaque PR
- deploy-functions.yml : deploy Edge Functions sur push main

---

## 10. Conventions

### Nommage
- Fichiers : kebab-case
- Composants : PascalCase
- Fonctions/hooks : camelCase
- Types : PascalCase
- Constantes : UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
- Tables DB : snake_case pluriel

### Packages npm
- @royal/ui
- @royal/shared
- @royal/supabase

### Structure composants
```
components/
├── ui/        # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)
├── forms/     # Formulaires metier (ProgramForm, CampaignForm)
├── layout/    # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/    # Composants metier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

### Qualite
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de `any`, `unknown` si necessaire

# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Reecriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

---

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale composee de :
- **Dashboard marchand** : gestion programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes de fidelite, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Le design visuel reprend le langage de citedby-io : glassmorphism, Geist Sans, accent emeraude, light/dark mode.

---

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

```
RoyalApp/
├── apps/
│   ├── dashboard/            # Next.js 15 — merchant dashboard (port 3000)
│   └── customer-web/         # Next.js 15 — customer PWA (port 3001)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                   # Design system (@royal/ui)
│   ├── shared/               # Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
│   └── supabase/             # Client Supabase + helpers (@royal/supabase)
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/
│   │   └── 001_initial_schema.sql
│   ├── functions/
│   │   ├── _shared/
│   │   ├── validate-scan/
│   │   ├── redeem-reward/
│   │   ├── redeem-by-merchant/
│   │   ├── send-push/
│   │   ├── auto-notifications/
│   │   ├── update-tiers/
│   │   ├── proximity-check/
│   │   ├── process-referral/
│   │   └── api-v1/
│   └── config.toml
├── docs/plans/
├── .github/workflows/
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── turbo.json
├── .nvmrc
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 3. Design System (@royal/ui)

### Tokens CSS

**Light mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #FAFAF8 |
| --bg-surface | #FFFFFF |
| --bg-elevated | #F5F5F3 |
| --bg-sidebar | #FFFFFF |
| --border-default | #E5E7EB |
| --border-subtle | #F0F0EE |
| --border-strong | #D1D5DB |
| --text-primary | #1A1A1A |
| --text-secondary | #6B7280 |
| --text-tertiary | #9CA3AF |
| --accent | #059669 |
| --accent-hover | #047857 |
| --accent-subtle | rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.08) |
| --glass-surface | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) |
| --glass-border | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) |

**Dark mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #09090B |
| --bg-surface | #18181B |
| --bg-elevated | #27272A |
| --bg-sidebar | #0F0F11 |
| --border-default | #27272A |
| --border-strong | #3F3F46 |
| --text-primary | #FAFAFA |
| --text-secondary | #A1A1AA |
| --accent | #10B981 |
| --accent-text | #34D399 |
| --glass-surface | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) |
| --glass-border | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) |

### Typographie
- Principal : Geist Sans
- Mono : Geist Mono
- Scale : text-xs a text-5xl, font-medium/semibold/bold

### Layout
- **Dashboard** : AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
- **Customer-web** : Mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)

### Composants
- ninja-card : glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, hover-lift
- StatsCard : grille KPI 4 colonnes responsive
- Badge : semantic (success/warning/error) + tiers (bronze/silver/gold/vip)
- Button : primary (blanc/noir), secondary (glass), danger
- Input : bg-base, focus ring accent
- Modal : backdrop blur, rounded-2xl

### Animations
- fadeInUp, shimmer, pulseDot
- hover-lift (translateY -2px + shadow)
- press-effect (scale 0.98)
- stagger delays (50ms increments)

---

## 4. Base de donnees — Migration unique

### Tables

| Table | Role |
|---|---|
| merchants | Comptes marchands (plan, stripe_id, ai_mode, lat/lng) |
| merchant_locations | Multi-sites avec PostGIS |
| loyalty_programs | Programmes stamp/points (welcome bonus, expiration) |
| rewards | Recompenses par programme |
| tier_rules | Regles upgrade Bronze-Silver-Gold-VIP |
| customers | Profils clients (email, push_token, language) |
| customer_cards | Cartes fidelite (stamps, points, tier) |
| customer_qr_codes | QR personnels clients |
| transactions | Historique (type, value, validated_by) |
| qr_codes | QR marchands comptoir |
| campaigns | Campagnes marketing (A/B via parent_campaign_id) |
| notifications | Journal notifications |
| referrals | Systeme parrainage |
| api_keys | Cles API POS (SHA-256) |

### Inclus
- RLS policies sur toutes les tables
- Vue merchant_kpis
- PostGIS + triggers geographiques
- RPCs : find_nearby_merchants, create_customer_with_qr, validate_customer_qr, track_campaign_event
- Storage bucket logos

---

## 5. Edge Functions

| Fonction | Role |
|---|---|
| validate-scan | Client scanne QR marchand, cree/maj carte + stamps/points + welcome bonus |
| redeem-reward | Client redime reward |
| redeem-by-merchant | Marchand scanne QR client, valide + redime |
| send-push | Envoi campagne push avec split A/B |
| auto-notifications | Cron : rappels inactivite, expirations, upgrades |
| update-tiers | Cron : evalue tier_rules 90j, upgrade/downgrade |
| proximity-check | Position client, notifications marchands proches |
| process-referral | Traitement parrainage |
| api-v1 | API REST publique POS (auth API key) |

Couche partagee _shared/ : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client.

---

## 6. Dashboard marchand — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| (dashboard)/ | Home KPI, programmes actifs, activite recente |
| (dashboard)/programs/ | Liste programmes + plan limits |
| (dashboard)/programs/new | Creation programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id] | Detail + edition programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id]/rewards | Gestion rewards |
| (dashboard)/clients/ | Table clients (tier, activite) |
| (dashboard)/campaigns/ | Creation + liste campagnes A/B |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ | Dashboard graphiques (recharts) |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ab-results | Resultats A/B |
| (dashboard)/scanner/ | Scanner QR client |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/ | Generateur QR marchand |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/nfc | Config tags NFC |
| (dashboard)/subscription/ | Abonnement Stripe |
| (dashboard)/settings/ | Parametres (AI mode, push limits) |
| (dashboard)/settings/api | Cles API POS |
| (dashboard)/settings/locations | Multi-sites |

### API Routes

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| api/stripe/checkout | Session Stripe Checkout |
| api/stripe/portal | Portail client Stripe |
| api/stripe/webhook | Webhook Stripe, maj plan |
| api/n8n/webhook | Webhook n8n (campaigns, notifications, stats) |
| api/pos/validate | POS, ajouter stamps/points |
| api/pos/redeem | POS, redimer reward |
| api/campaigns/track | Tracking opens/clicks/conversions |

---

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| / | Landing (redirect si connecte) |
| /login | Auth email/password |
| /register | Inscription (support ?ref=CODE) |
| /dashboard | Cartes fidelite + QR personnel |
| /scan | Scanner QR marchand |
| /dashboard/settings | Profil, langue, notifications |

Layout mobile-first : header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil).

---

## 8. Integrations

### Stripe
- Plans : Free (0 EUR) / Pro (29 EUR/mois) / Business (79 EUR/mois)
- Checkout Session, webhook, maj plan marchand
- Portail self-service

### n8n
- Modes : manual / assisted / autonomous
- Actions webhook : send_campaign, send_notification, get_inactive_customers, get_campaign_stats
- Auth : header X-N8N-Secret

### Web Push
- VAPID keys en env vars
- Inscription via PushManager cote customer-web
- push_token sauve dans customers
- Envoi via send-push Edge Function

### PostGIS
- Extension activee dans migration
- merchant_locations avec geog
- RPC find_nearby_merchants
- proximity-check Edge Function

### i18n
- next-intl dans les deux apps
- Langues : fr, en, es, ar
- Detection auto navigateur + override settings

### NFC
- Web NFC API (Chrome Android)
- Fallback QR si non supporte
- Payload = secret_key QR marchand

### Referrals
- referral_code unique par client
- Lien : customer-web/register?ref=CODE
- process-referral Edge Function
- Bonus parrain + filleul

---

## 9. Deploiement

| Composant | Cible |
|---|---|
| apps/dashboard | Vercel (royal-dashboard) |
| apps/customer-web | Vercel (royal-customer) |
| Supabase | Supabase Cloud |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |

### GitHub Actions
- ci.yml : lint + typecheck + build sur chaque PR
- deploy-functions.yml : deploy Edge Functions sur push main

---

## 10. Conventions

### Nommage
- Fichiers : kebab-case
- Composants : PascalCase
- Fonctions/hooks : camelCase
- Types : PascalCase
- Constantes : UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
- Tables DB : snake_case pluriel

### Packages npm
- @royal/ui
- @royal/shared
- @royal/supabase

### Structure composants
```
components/
├── ui/        # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)
├── forms/     # Formulaires metier (ProgramForm, CampaignForm)
├── layout/    # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/    # Composants metier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

### Qualite
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de any, unknown si necessaire

# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Reecriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale :
- **Dashboard marchand** : programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes fidelite, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Design visuel : citedby-io (glassmorphism, Geist Sans, emeraude, light/dark).

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

- apps/dashboard : Next.js 15, merchant dashboard (port 3000)
- apps/customer-web : Next.js 15, customer PWA (port 3001)
- packages/ui : Design system (@royal/ui)
- packages/shared : Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
- packages/supabase : Client + helpers (@royal/supabase)
- supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql : migration unique
- supabase/functions/ : 9 Edge Functions + _shared/

## 3. Design System (@royal/ui)

Light: bg #FAFAF8, surface #FFFFFF, accent #059669, text #1A1A1A
Dark: bg #09090B, surface #18181B, accent #10B981, text #FAFAFA
Glass: backdrop-blur, rgba surfaces/borders
Font: Geist Sans + Geist Mono
Layout dashboard: AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
Layout customer: mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)
Composants: ninja-card, StatsCard, Badge, Button, Input, Modal
Animations: fadeInUp, shimmer, hover-lift, press-effect, stagger

## 4. Base de donnees — Migration unique

Tables: merchants, merchant_locations, loyalty_programs, rewards, tier_rules,
customers, customer_cards, customer_qr_codes, transactions, qr_codes,
campaigns, notifications, referrals, api_keys
Inclus: RLS, vue merchant_kpis, PostGIS, RPCs, Storage bucket logos

## 5. Edge Functions

validate-scan, redeem-reward, redeem-by-merchant, send-push,
auto-notifications, update-tiers, proximity-check, process-referral, api-v1
Couche _shared/ : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client

## 6. Dashboard — Pages

Home KPI, programs (list/new/[id]/rewards), clients, campaigns,
analytics (dashboard/ab-results), scanner, qr-codes (list/nfc),
subscription, settings (general/api/locations)
API routes: stripe (checkout/portal/webhook), n8n/webhook,
pos (validate/redeem), campaigns/track

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

Landing, login, register (?ref=CODE), dashboard, scan, settings
Layout: header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil)

## 8. Integrations

Stripe: Free/Pro/Business (0/29/79 EUR), checkout+webhook+portal
n8n: manual/assisted/autonomous, X-N8N-Secret auth
Web Push: VAPID, PushManager, send-push Edge Function
PostGIS: merchant_locations geog, find_nearby_merchants RPC
i18n: next-intl, fr/en/es/ar
NFC: Web NFC API, fallback QR
Referrals: referral_code, process-referral, bonus parrain+filleul

## 9. Deploiement

Vercel (2 projets), Supabase Cloud, GitHub Actions (ci.yml + deploy-functions.yml)

## 10. Conventions

Fichiers kebab-case, composants PascalCase, fonctions camelCase
Types PascalCase, constantes UPPER_SNAKE_CASE, tables snake_case
Packages: @royal/ui, @royal/shared, @royal/supabase

input.content:
# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Reecriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

---

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale composee de :
- **Dashboard marchand** : gestion programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes de fidelite, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Le design visuel reprend le langage de citedby-io : glassmorphism, Geist Sans, accent emeraude, light/dark mode.

---

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

```
RoyalApp/
├── apps/
│   ├── dashboard/            # Next.js 15 — merchant dashboard (port 3000)
│   └── customer-web/         # Next.js 15 — customer PWA (port 3001)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                   # Design system (@royal/ui)
│   ├── shared/               # Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
│   └── supabase/             # Client Supabase + helpers (@royal/supabase)
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/
│   │   └── 001_initial_schema.sql
│   ├── functions/
│   │   ├── _shared/          # cors, errors, validate, supabase client
│   │   ├── validate-scan/
│   │   ├── redeem-reward/
│   │   ├── redeem-by-merchant/
│   │   ├── send-push/
│   │   ├── auto-notifications/
│   │   ├── update-tiers/
│   │   ├── proximity-check/
│   │   ├── process-referral/
│   │   └── api-v1/
│   └── config.toml
├── docs/plans/
├── .github/workflows/
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── turbo.json
├── .nvmrc
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 3. Design System (@royal/ui)

### Tokens CSS

**Light mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #FAFAF8 |
| --bg-surface | #FFFFFF |
| --bg-elevated | #F5F5F3 |
| --bg-sidebar | #FFFFFF |
| --border-default | #E5E7EB |
| --border-subtle | #F0F0EE |
| --border-strong | #D1D5DB |
| --text-primary | #1A1A1A |
| --text-secondary | #6B7280 |
| --text-tertiary | #9CA3AF |
| --accent | #059669 |
| --accent-hover | #047857 |
| --accent-subtle | rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.08) |
| --glass-surface | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) |
| --glass-border | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) |

**Dark mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #09090B |
| --bg-surface | #18181B |
| --bg-elevated | #27272A |
| --bg-sidebar | #0F0F11 |
| --border-default | #27272A |
| --border-strong | #3F3F46 |
| --text-primary | #FAFAFA |
| --text-secondary | #A1A1AA |
| --accent | #10B981 |
| --accent-text | #34D399 |
| --glass-surface | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) |
| --glass-border | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) |

### Typographie
- Principal : Geist Sans
- Mono : Geist Mono
- Scale : text-xs a text-5xl, font-medium/semibold/bold

### Layout
- **Dashboard** : AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
- **Customer-web** : Mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)

### Composants
- ninja-card : glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, hover-lift
- StatsCard : grille KPI 4 colonnes responsive
- Badge : semantic (success/warning/error) + tiers (bronze/silver/gold/vip)
- Button : primary (blanc/noir), secondary (glass), danger
- Input : bg-base, focus ring accent
- Modal : backdrop blur, rounded-2xl

### Animations
- fadeInUp, shimmer, pulseDot
- hover-lift (translateY -2px + shadow)
- press-effect (scale 0.98)
- stagger delays (50ms increments)

---

## 4. Base de donnees — Migration unique

### Tables

| Table | Role |
|---|---|
| merchants | Comptes marchands (plan, stripe_id, ai_mode, lat/lng) |
| merchant_locations | Multi-sites avec PostGIS |
| loyalty_programs | Programmes stamp/points (welcome bonus, expiration) |
| rewards | Recompenses par programme |
| tier_rules | Regles upgrade Bronze-Silver-Gold-VIP |
| customers | Profils clients (email, push_token, language) |
| customer_cards | Cartes fidelite (stamps, points, tier) |
| customer_qr_codes | QR personnels clients |
| transactions | Historique (type, value, validated_by) |
| qr_codes | QR marchands comptoir |
| campaigns | Campagnes marketing (A/B via parent_campaign_id) |
| notifications | Journal notifications |
| referrals | Systeme parrainage |
| api_keys | Cles API POS (SHA-256) |

### Inclus
- RLS policies sur toutes les tables
- Vue merchant_kpis
- PostGIS + triggers geographiques
- RPCs : find_nearby_merchants, create_customer_with_qr, validate_customer_qr, track_campaign_event
- Storage bucket logos

---

## 5. Edge Functions

| Fonction | Role |
|---|---|
| validate-scan | Client scanne QR marchand, cree/maj carte + stamps/points + welcome bonus |
| redeem-reward | Client redime reward |
| redeem-by-merchant | Marchand scanne QR client, valide + redime |
| send-push | Envoi campagne push avec split A/B |
| auto-notifications | Cron : rappels inactivite, expirations, upgrades |
| update-tiers | Cron : evalue tier_rules 90j, upgrade/downgrade |
| proximity-check | Position client, notifications marchands proches |
| process-referral | Traitement parrainage |
| api-v1 | API REST publique POS (auth API key) |

Couche partagee _shared/ : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client.

---

## 6. Dashboard marchand — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| (dashboard)/ | Home KPI, programmes actifs, activite recente |
| (dashboard)/programs/ | Liste programmes + plan limits |
| (dashboard)/programs/new | Creation programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id] | Detail + edition programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id]/rewards | Gestion rewards |
| (dashboard)/clients/ | Table clients (tier, activite) |
| (dashboard)/campaigns/ | Creation + liste campagnes A/B |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ | Dashboard graphiques (recharts) |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ab-results | Resultats A/B |
| (dashboard)/scanner/ | Scanner QR client |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/ | Generateur QR marchand |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/nfc | Config tags NFC |
| (dashboard)/subscription/ | Abonnement Stripe |
| (dashboard)/settings/ | Parametres (AI mode, push limits) |
| (dashboard)/settings/api | Cles API POS |
| (dashboard)/settings/locations | Multi-sites |

### API Routes

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| api/stripe/checkout | Session Stripe Checkout |
| api/stripe/portal | Portail client Stripe |
| api/stripe/webhook | Webhook Stripe, maj plan |
| api/n8n/webhook | Webhook n8n (campaigns, notifications, stats) |
| api/pos/validate | POS, ajouter stamps/points |
| api/pos/redeem | POS, redimer reward |
| api/campaigns/track | Tracking opens/clicks/conversions |

---

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| / | Landing (redirect si connecte) |
| /login | Auth email/password |
| /register | Inscription (support ?ref=CODE) |
| /dashboard | Cartes fidelite + QR personnel |
| /scan | Scanner QR marchand |
| /dashboard/settings | Profil, langue, notifications |

Layout mobile-first : header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil).

---

## 8. Integrations

### Stripe
- Plans : Free (0 EUR) / Pro (29 EUR/mois) / Business (79 EUR/mois)
- Checkout Session, webhook, maj plan marchand
- Portail self-service

### n8n
- Modes : manual / assisted / autonomous
- Actions webhook : send_campaign, send_notification, get_inactive_customers, get_campaign_stats
- Auth : header X-N8N-Secret

### Web Push
- VAPID keys en env vars
- Inscription via PushManager cote customer-web
- push_token sauve dans customers
- Envoi via send-push Edge Function

### PostGIS
- Extension activee dans migration
- merchant_locations avec geog
- RPC find_nearby_merchants
- proximity-check Edge Function

### i18n
- next-intl dans les deux apps
- Langues : fr, en, es, ar
- Detection auto navigateur + override settings

### NFC
- Web NFC API (Chrome Android)
- Fallback QR si non supporte
- Payload = secret_key QR marchand

### Referrals
- referral_code unique par client
- Lien : customer-web/register?ref=CODE
- process-referral Edge Function
- Bonus parrain + filleul

---

## 9. Deploiement

| Composant | Cible |
|---|---|
| apps/dashboard | Vercel (royal-dashboard) |
| apps/customer-web | Vercel (royal-customer) |
| Supabase | Supabase Cloud |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |

### GitHub Actions
- ci.yml : lint + typecheck + build sur chaque PR
- deploy-functions.yml : deploy Edge Functions sur push main

---

## 10. Conventions

### Nommage
- Fichiers : kebab-case
- Composants : PascalCase
- Fonctions/hooks : camelCase
- Types : PascalCase
- Constantes : UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
- Tables DB : snake_case pluriel

### Packages npm
- @royal/ui
- @royal/shared
- @royal/supabase

### Structure composants
```
components/
├── ui/        # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)
├── forms/     # Formulaires metier (ProgramForm, CampaignForm)
├── layout/    # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/    # Composants metier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

### Qualite
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de any, unknown si necessaire

input.content:
# RoyalApp — Design Document

> Reecriture propre de loyalty-app. Plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale.
> Date : 2026-02-27

---

## 1. Vue d'ensemble

RoyalApp est une plateforme SaaS B2B de fidelite digitale composee de :
- **Dashboard marchand** : gestion programmes, clients, campagnes, analytics, abonnements
- **PWA client** : scan QR, cartes de fidelite, QR personnel, notifications
- **Backend Supabase** : PostgreSQL 17, Auth, Edge Functions, PostGIS, Storage

Le design visuel reprend le langage de citedby-io : glassmorphism, Geist Sans, accent emeraude, light/dark mode.

---

## 2. Architecture — Monorepo pnpm + Turborepo

```
RoyalApp/
├── apps/
│   ├── dashboard/            # Next.js 15 — merchant dashboard (port 3000)
│   └── customer-web/         # Next.js 15 — customer PWA (port 3001)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/                   # Design system (@royal/ui)
│   ├── shared/               # Types TypeScript (@royal/shared)
│   └── supabase/             # Client Supabase + helpers (@royal/supabase)
├── supabase/
│   ├── migrations/
│   │   └── 001_initial_schema.sql
│   ├── functions/
│   │   ├── _shared/          # cors, errors, validate, supabase client
│   │   ├── validate-scan/
│   │   ├── redeem-reward/
│   │   ├── redeem-by-merchant/
│   │   ├── send-push/
│   │   ├── auto-notifications/
│   │   ├── update-tiers/
│   │   ├── proximity-check/
│   │   ├── process-referral/
│   │   └── api-v1/
│   └── config.toml
├── docs/plans/
├── .github/workflows/
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
├── turbo.json
├── .nvmrc
└── .gitignore
```

---

## 3. Design System (@royal/ui)

### Tokens CSS

**Light mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #FAFAF8 |
| --bg-surface | #FFFFFF |
| --bg-elevated | #F5F5F3 |
| --bg-sidebar | #FFFFFF |
| --border-default | #E5E7EB |
| --border-subtle | #F0F0EE |
| --border-strong | #D1D5DB |
| --text-primary | #1A1A1A |
| --text-secondary | #6B7280 |
| --text-tertiary | #9CA3AF |
| --accent | #059669 |
| --accent-hover | #047857 |
| --accent-subtle | rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.08) |
| --glass-surface | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) |
| --glass-border | rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) |

**Dark mode :**

| Token | Valeur |
|---|---|
| --bg-base | #09090B |
| --bg-surface | #18181B |
| --bg-elevated | #27272A |
| --bg-sidebar | #0F0F11 |
| --border-default | #27272A |
| --border-strong | #3F3F46 |
| --text-primary | #FAFAFA |
| --text-secondary | #A1A1AA |
| --accent | #10B981 |
| --accent-text | #34D399 |
| --glass-surface | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) |
| --glass-border | rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) |

### Typographie
- Principal : Geist Sans
- Mono : Geist Mono
- Scale : text-xs a text-5xl, font-medium/semibold/bold

### Layout
- **Dashboard** : AppShell (header 48px + sidebar 224px + main max-w-6xl)
- **Customer-web** : Mobile-first (header compact + bottom nav)

### Composants
- ninja-card : glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, hover-lift
- StatsCard : grille KPI 4 colonnes responsive
- Badge : semantic (success/warning/error) + tiers (bronze/silver/gold/vip)
- Button : primary (blanc/noir), secondary (glass), danger
- Input : bg-base, focus ring accent
- Modal : backdrop blur, rounded-2xl

### Animations
- fadeInUp, shimmer, pulseDot
- hover-lift (translateY -2px + shadow)
- press-effect (scale 0.98)
- stagger delays (50ms increments)

---

## 4. Base de donnees — Migration unique

### Tables

| Table | Role |
|---|---|
| merchants | Comptes marchands (plan, stripe_id, ai_mode, lat/lng) |
| merchant_locations | Multi-sites avec PostGIS |
| loyalty_programs | Programmes stamp/points (welcome bonus, expiration) |
| rewards | Recompenses par programme |
| tier_rules | Regles upgrade Bronze-Silver-Gold-VIP |
| customers | Profils clients (email, push_token, language) |
| customer_cards | Cartes fidelite (stamps, points, tier) |
| customer_qr_codes | QR personnels clients |
| transactions | Historique (type, value, validated_by) |
| qr_codes | QR marchands comptoir |
| campaigns | Campagnes marketing (A/B via parent_campaign_id) |
| notifications | Journal notifications |
| referrals | Systeme parrainage |
| api_keys | Cles API POS (SHA-256) |

### Inclus
- RLS policies sur toutes les tables
- Vue merchant_kpis
- PostGIS + triggers geographiques
- RPCs : find_nearby_merchants, create_customer_with_qr, validate_customer_qr, track_campaign_event
- Storage bucket logos

---

## 5. Edge Functions

| Fonction | Role |
|---|---|
| validate-scan | Client scanne QR marchand, cree/maj carte + stamps/points + welcome bonus |
| redeem-reward | Client redime reward |
| redeem-by-merchant | Marchand scanne QR client, valide + redime |
| send-push | Envoi campagne push avec split A/B |
| auto-notifications | Cron : rappels inactivite, expirations, upgrades |
| update-tiers | Cron : evalue tier_rules 90j, upgrade/downgrade |
| proximity-check | Position client, notifications marchands proches |
| process-referral | Traitement parrainage |
| api-v1 | API REST publique POS (auth API key) |

Couche partagee _shared/ : cors, errors, validate (Zod), supabase client.

---

## 6. Dashboard marchand — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| (dashboard)/ | Home KPI, programmes actifs, activite recente |
| (dashboard)/programs/ | Liste programmes + plan limits |
| (dashboard)/programs/new | Creation programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id] | Detail + edition programme |
| (dashboard)/programs/[id]/rewards | Gestion rewards |
| (dashboard)/clients/ | Table clients (tier, activite) |
| (dashboard)/campaigns/ | Creation + liste campagnes A/B |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ | Dashboard graphiques (recharts) |
| (dashboard)/analytics/ab-results | Resultats A/B |
| (dashboard)/scanner/ | Scanner QR client |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/ | Generateur QR marchand |
| (dashboard)/qr-codes/nfc | Config tags NFC |
| (dashboard)/subscription/ | Abonnement Stripe |
| (dashboard)/settings/ | Parametres (AI mode, push limits) |
| (dashboard)/settings/api | Cles API POS |
| (dashboard)/settings/locations | Multi-sites |

### API Routes

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| api/stripe/checkout | Session Stripe Checkout |
| api/stripe/portal | Portail client Stripe |
| api/stripe/webhook | Webhook Stripe, maj plan |
| api/n8n/webhook | Webhook n8n (campaigns, notifications, stats) |
| api/pos/validate | POS, ajouter stamps/points |
| api/pos/redeem | POS, redimer reward |
| api/campaigns/track | Tracking opens/clicks/conversions |

---

## 7. Customer-web — Pages

| Route | Role |
|---|---|
| / | Landing (redirect si connecte) |
| /login | Auth email/password |
| /register | Inscription (support ?ref=CODE) |
| /dashboard | Cartes fidelite + QR personnel |
| /scan | Scanner QR marchand |
| /dashboard/settings | Profil, langue, notifications |

Layout mobile-first : header compact + bottom nav (Accueil, Scanner, Cartes, Profil).

---

## 8. Integrations

### Stripe
- Plans : Free (0 EUR) / Pro (29 EUR/mois) / Business (79 EUR/mois)
- Checkout Session, webhook, maj plan marchand
- Portail self-service

### n8n
- Modes : manual / assisted / autonomous
- Actions webhook : send_campaign, send_notification, get_inactive_customers, get_campaign_stats
- Auth : header X-N8N-Secret

### Web Push
- VAPID keys en env vars
- Inscription via PushManager cote customer-web
- push_token sauve dans customers
- Envoi via send-push Edge Function

### PostGIS
- Extension activee dans migration
- merchant_locations avec geog
- RPC find_nearby_merchants
- proximity-check Edge Function

### i18n
- next-intl dans les deux apps
- Langues : fr, en, es, ar
- Detection auto navigateur + override settings

### NFC
- Web NFC API (Chrome Android)
- Fallback QR si non supporte
- Payload = secret_key QR marchand

### Referrals
- referral_code unique par client
- Lien : customer-web/register?ref=CODE
- process-referral Edge Function
- Bonus parrain + filleul

---

## 9. Deploiement

| Composant | Cible |
|---|---|
| apps/dashboard | Vercel (royal-dashboard) |
| apps/customer-web | Vercel (royal-customer) |
| Supabase | Supabase Cloud |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |

### GitHub Actions
- ci.yml : lint + typecheck + build sur chaque PR
- deploy-functions.yml : deploy Edge Functions sur push main

---

## 10. Conventions

### Nommage
- Fichiers : kebab-case
- Composants : PascalCase
- Fonctions/hooks : camelCase
- Types : PascalCase
- Constantes : UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
- Tables DB : snake_case pluriel

### Packages npm
- @royal/ui
- @royal/shared
- @royal/supabase

### Structure composants
```
components/
├── ui/        # Primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal)
├── forms/     # Formulaires metier (ProgramForm, CampaignForm)
├── layout/    # AppShell, Header, Sidebar, MobileNav
└── domain/    # Composants metier (LoyaltyCard, QrGenerator, Scanner)
```

### Qualite
- TypeScript strict mode
- ESLint + Prettier (single quotes, trailing commas, 100 chars)
- Pas de any, unknown si necessaire
